one_line_description: Southernmost winery in the U.S., set on tropical acreage in the Redland with courtyard, great-lawn and thatched-roof tiki spaces available for weddings and private events.
Waterfront wildlife park on Watson Island offering the Bloom Ballroom, landscaped terraces, garden settings and the outdoor Banyan Tree space for weddings, corporate events and private celebrations.
Historic oceanfront luxury resort with ballrooms and indoor-outdoor venues spanning more than 70,000 square feet for weddings, conferences and corporate meetings.
All-inclusive tropical wedding venue in Miami's Redland featuring a tiki-hut reception, lush gardens and a waterfall, with indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions.
Oceanfront luxury hotel in the Faena District offering the Faena Theater, the Faena Forum exhibit halls and amphitheater, and other spaces for weddings, banquets and corporate events.
Downtown Miami Smithsonian-affiliate museum offering indoor galleries and an open-air Cultural Plaza for weddings, receptions and private gatherings.
Historic 1939 coral-rock former police and fire station in downtown Coral Gables offering an indoor meeting room and an open-air courtyard for weddings and private events.
Bayfront design hotel on West Avenue offering indoor and outdoor studios, a Sunset Ballroom and terrace, garden and penthouse lounge spaces for weddings and private events.

business_name: Adrienne Arsht Center for the Performing Arts
one_line_description: Biscayne Boulevard performing-arts complex offering its opera house, concert hall, studio theater and public spaces for weddings, galas, conferences and private functions.
Collins Avenue boutique hotel near South Beach offering a restaurant, poolside bar, games room, lounge and terrace spaces available for private hire and meetings.
Rustic wedding venue on five secluded acres in the Redland featuring a two-story barn and grounds for ceremonies and receptions of up to 200 guests.
Waterfall Garden Estate wedding venue in Miami's Redland countryside offering exclusive, tranquil outdoor settings for ceremonies and receptions.
